message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 165 progress comment

RusticMaple: replay.rs — handle_control_with_cx plugs
cancellation hole in Pause branch. Legacy used `for_request()`
orphan cx for the watch wait; cx-first variant threads caller cx.
play_with_cx L689 + L713 migrated. Lesson: audit orphan cxs
(for_request/for_testing) inside _with_cx fns — they sever the
cancellation chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
